ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who performed the track */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the track (0-100) */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the track */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Measure of the track's acousticness (0-1) */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Measure of the track's danceability (0-1) */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Measure of the track's liveness (0-1) */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Measure of the track's loudness in decibels (dB) */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Measure of the track's speechiness (0-1) */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Measure of the track's tempo in beats per minute (BPM) */,
  "valence" REAL /* Measure of the track's valence (0-1) */,
  "track_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in seconds */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the track */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album the track belongs to */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the track belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary genre of the artist */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's profile picture */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON string of the artist's social media links */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the artist */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the artist (if applicable) */,
  "origin_country" TEXT /* Origin country of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artists_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regular, artist, admin) */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the album */,
  "album_cover_url" TEXT /* URL to the album cover art */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_tracks" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., play, like, add to playlist) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user has played the track */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user to the track (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_tracks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_tracks_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "privacy_status" TEXT /* Privacy status of the playlist (public, private) */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist-track relationship */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the track was added to the playlist */,
  "added_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preferred_genres" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of preferred genres */,
  "preferred_artists" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of preferred artists */,
  "email_notifications" INTEGER /* Whether the user receives email notifications */,
  "dark_mode" INTEGER /* Whether the user prefers dark mode */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who earned the reward */,
  "reward_name" TEXT /* Name of the reward */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of the reward (e.g., badge, achievement) */,
  "reward_date" TEXT /* Date the reward was earned */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
